In Twilight Imperium 4 Prophecy of Kings, what is the flagship of the Argent Flight?
Return the faction, expansion source, flagship name, cost, combat, move, capacity,
sustain damage status, and the flagship ability.
prompt.label:
Answer the question with JSON only.
Use exactly the schema defined by the response format.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

{{question}}

output.name: Quetzecoatl
output.ability: Other players' units in this system lose PLANETARY SHIELD and SPACE CANNON and cannot use Bombardment against units in this system.

vars.question:
In Twilight Imperium 4 Prophecy of Kings, what is the flagship of the Argent Flight?
Return the faction, expansion source, flagship name, cost, combat, move, capacity,
sustain damage status, and the flagship ability.

metadata.name: Argent flagship detailed reference (Prophecy of Kings)
metadata.description: YAML-sourced Prophecy of Kings testcase for Argent Flight. Verifies the flagship statline plus the space-cannon prevention clause.

assert.value: typeof output.ability === 'string' && output.ability.toLowerCase().includes('your ships in this system')
